author: doll-agent
content: Audit. ferray-polynomial/src/ops.rs already implements std::ops::Add/Sub/Mul/Neg for all six polynomial bases (Polynomial, Chebyshev, Legendre, Hermite, HermiteE, Laguerre), in both borrowed (&T op &T) and owned (T op T) forms via the impl_poly_ops! macro. Operator forms panic on domain/window mismatch (matching ndarray's shape-error convention); code that wants recovery uses Poly::add/sub/mul. Issue body is stale.
